services.sectionDescription: Professional audio services crafted by experienced engineers for an experience beyond ordinary.

items.title: Recording
items.description: Capture your sound in our acoustically treated rooms with world-class microphones and preamps.

items.title: Mixing & Mastering
items.description: Professional mixing and mastering that brings clarity, punch, and polish to your tracks.

items.title: Podcast Production
items.description: End-to-end podcast production — from recording to editing to publishing on all major platforms.

items.title: Sound Design
items.description: Custom sound design for film, games, and media. From ambient textures to full orchestral scores.

about.title: Where Silence Meets
paragraphs: At Echo Sound Studios, we believe great music starts with the perfect environment. Our acoustically engineered rooms and premium analog-digital hybrid setup create the ideal space for artists to bring their vision to life.
Whether you're recording your debut single or mastering an album, our team of experienced engineers ensures every frequency, every nuance, every beat is captured with crystalline precision.

equipment.sectionDescription: Explore our professionally designed spaces, each optimized for different recording scenarios.

rooms.title: Main Studio — Room A
rooms.subtitle: 800 sq ft Live Room
rooms.description: Our flagship recording space features 18-foot ceilings, a Steinway grand piano, and room for a full orchestra. Acoustically tuned for pristine recordings.

rooms.title: Control Room
rooms.subtitle: Mixing & Mastering Suite
rooms.description: The nerve center of Echo Sound Studios. Equipped with a 48-channel SSL console, Pro Tools HDX, and a curated collection of outboard gear.

rooms.title: Vocal Booth — Room B
rooms.subtitle: Isolated Recording Space
rooms.description: A perfectly isolated, acoustically dead space for capturing clean vocals, voiceovers, and podcasts. Features a Neumann U87 and an Avalon channel strip.

artists.heading: Artists Who Trust Us
artists.subtitle: ...and 200+ more artists who've recorded with us

items.alt: Studio nighttime atmosphere with neon lighting
items.label: Studio Night

items.name: Arjun Mehta
items.quote: Echo Sound Studios is where my album came alive. The engineers understood my vision from day one — the warmth of the analog console mixed with the precision of digital gave my tracks a sound I couldn't get anywhere else.

items.name: Sneha Kapoor
items.quote: We've been recording our podcast here for over a year now. The setup is always ready, the sound quality is broadcast-grade, and the team makes our editing workflow seamless. Highly recommended.

items.name: Rahul Deshmukh
items.quote: I sent rough mixes and got back absolute gold. The mastering engineer has an incredible ear — the final tracks had a clarity and punch that elevated our entire project.
